case_title: CACH LLC VS. BOUAKHAM SINGHARATH et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 AND REQUESTING THE COURT TO ACCEPT COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGHARATH, BOUAKHAM $12,471.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,471.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
